things.name: National Museum of Cameroon
things.description: Former presidential palace with extraordinary Bamileke, Fulani and Fang tribal art

things.name: Mvog-Betsi Zoo & Botanical Garden
things.description: Gorillas, chimpanzees and an impressive array of Cameroonian wildlife

things.name: Bamileke Royal Palace (Bafoussam)
things.description: Traditional Bamileke chiefly compound 4 hours west - extraordinary carved architecture

things.name: Cathedral Notre-Dame des Victoires
things.description: French colonial cathedral on the Hill of Victory overlooking Yaounde

things.name: Artisanat Centre
things.description: Craft market with Cameroonian masks, brass figures and woven cloth

things.name: African Union Museum
things.description: History of Pan-Africanism and the Organisation of African Unity

things.name: Mefou National Park (Ape Action Africa)
things.description: Sanctuary for rescued chimps, gorillas and drills in a forest reserve

things.name: Reunification Monument
things.description: Monument marking the unification of French and British Cameroon in 1961

things.name: Marche Central & Mvog-Mbi Market
things.description: Yaounde's two main markets with the diversity of Cameroon on display

things.name: Okok na Nkola (Bitter Leaf with Crayfish)
things.description: Yaounde specialty - bitter leaf and pumpkin seeds cooked with dried crayfish
